title: LLM API Keys
subtitle: Store the provider keys used to generate commit messages. Keys are verified with the provider before they are encrypted at rest.

empty.title: No LLM keys yet
empty.description: Add an OpenAI or Anthropic API key to start generating commit messages.

error.load: Failed to load LLM keys. Please try again.

toast.saveError: Failed to save LLM API key.
toast.deleteError: Failed to delete LLM API key.

upsertDialog.title: Add LLM API key
upsertDialog.description: We'll verify the key with the provider before storing it. It is encrypted at rest and never shown again.
upsertDialog.keyHelp: The key is sent once to the provider for verification and stored encrypted.
upsertDialog.replacingHint: This provider already has a key. Submitting will replace it.

deleteDialog.title: Delete LLM API key?
deleteDialog.description: The {provider} key will be permanently deleted. Commit generation with this provider will stop working until a new key is added.
